mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.username as author_name, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, u.username as author_name, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT a.*, u.username as author_name, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, u.username as author_name, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, u.username as author_name, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id JOIN article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id WHERE at.tag_id = #{tagId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, excerpt, content, author_id, category_id, image_url, read_time, view_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{excerpt}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{categoryId}, #{imageUrl}, #{readTime}, #{viewCount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET title = #{title}, excerpt = #{excerpt}, content = #{content}, author_id = #{authorId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, read_time = #{readTime}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.username as author_name, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
